hooks.command: printf '\n[PostCompact: re-injecting critical protocols]\n' >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE" && cat CTRL_PROTOCOLS.md DEV_LOG.md >> "$CLAUDE_ENV_FILE"
echo "[Config changed: $(basename $FILE_PATH) updated at $(date '+%H:%M:%S')] Re-read the updated file before next response."

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^rm '; then SAFE=$(echo "$CMD" | sed 's/^rm /trash /'); echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PreToolUse\",\"updatedInput\":{\"tool_input\":{\"command\":\"$SAFE\"}}}}"; fi
